_comment: TEMPLATE — Use this as a reference when adding a new plan/region to DaznPlan.json. Do NOT rename this file.
_note_structure: DaznPlan.json has 4 top-level plan keys. Each contains a TIER, RATE_PLAN, and per-region config.
_note_offers: 7-day trial and 1-month free are default behaviours controlled by OFFER_TYPE (not in the offers[] array). The offers[] array is ONLY for promotional/discount offers.
_note_defaults: Fields not set per-region fall back to GLOBAL_DEFAULTS in buildEventData.ts.

standard_monthly._comment: Standard tier, Flex – Pay Monthly plan

REGION_CODE._comment_required: These fields are REQUIRED for every region
REGION_CODE._comment_prices: All prices WITHOUT currency symbol (it's prepended dynamically)
REGION_CODE._comment_display_prices: Pre-formatted with currency (used in cancellation text, etc.)
REGION_CODE._comment_computed: These can be auto-computed by buildEventData if left empty
REGION_CODE._comment_descriptions: Plan page and payment page text
REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_TRIAL: In 7 days, you'll be charged £25.99/month. Cancel anytime before the end of the trial.
REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ANNUAL: First month free, then £15.99/month for 11 months (£175.89 total over 12 months). 12-month minimum term. On {{RENEWAL_DATE}} your plan renews automatically
REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ULTIMATE_APM: Your Annual (pay over time) plan will renew automatically on {{RENEWAL_DATE}}. Manage or cancel your annual renewal anytime in My Account. 12-month minimum term
REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ULTIMATE_APU: You can cancel the renewal to this subscription in My Account. You will still have full access to DAZN until the end of your annual cycle.
REGION_CODE._comment_ultimate_features: These are for the Ultimate tier plan page. Override per-region if needed.
REGION_CODE.ULTIMATE_FEATURE_1: Minimum 12 pay-per-views a year included at no extra cost.
REGION_CODE.ULTIMATE_FEATURE_2: 185+ fights a year from the world's best promoters.
REGION_CODE.ULTIMATE_FEATURE_3: HDR and Dolby 5.1 surround sound on select events.
REGION_CODE._comment_ultimate_pricing: Ultimate tier pricing (used for upsell calculations)
REGION_CODE._comment_offers: Promotional offers ONLY — NOT for 7-day trial / 1-month free (those are controlled by OFFER_TYPE above)

offers._comment: Example: standard flex promotional discount. Set enabled=true to activate.
offers.name: standard_flex_offer
offers.PLAN_LABEL: Flex – Pay Monthly - First Month Only
offers.OFFER_DESCRIPTION: Pay for the fight and get your first month of DAZN Standard for only £4.99.

standard_apm._comment: Standard tier, Annual – Pay Monthly plan

REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ANNUAL: First month free, then £15.99/month for 11 months...
REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ULTIMATE_APM: Your Annual (pay over time) plan will renew automatically...

ultimate_apm._comment: Ultimate tier, Annual – Pay Monthly plan

REGION_CODE.CANCELLATION_TEXT_ULTIMATE_APM: Your Annual (pay over time) plan will renew automatically...

offers._comment: Example: ultimate tier promotional discount. Set enabled=true to activate.
offers.name: ultimate_offer

ultimate_upfront._comment: Ultimate tier, Annual – Pay Upfront plan
